text:
リリーパの採掘場跡で
機甲種を討伐しろって
言われてんだけどさ。

薄暗い廃墟みたいなところで
やつらの大群に囲まれたときは
思わず泣……

いっ、いや……！
さすがのオレもやべーと思って
一時退散してきたんだけどよ！

あいつら、堅いしちょこまか動くし
ほんのちょーっとだけ
苦戦してんだよな……

でも、おたくのお手本があれば
やれる気がするんだ。
なあ

I've been ordered to totally annihilate some
automata in Lillipa's Abandoned Mine.

But when I went to those gloomy and down in
the dumps ruins, I got surrounded by a hoard,
and I... Well, I kinda choked up, pal.

N-Now don't gemme wrong! I just nailed a
strategic retreat! A temporary one, y'know?

I'm tellin' ya, they're hard as steel and
skitter all over the place, so I just had a
tiiiny bit of a rough time, yeah?

But if I followed your example, I bet I could
show it a thing or two. So, I'm beggin' ya!
